calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

Petition For Modification Of Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Continued To Feb-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Jim Quesada and Bill Quesada.

The Court questioned if a Special Needs Trust (SNT), was productive for a person over the age of 65. Mr. Der reported that if created by a third party, the SNT was not subject to an age limit. In addition, he reported that the home in San Fransisco was the only thing in the survivor's trust, that there was no cash, that Ms. Quesada lived in the home with a son, that both properties were valued about the same, that the Novato property was in a credit sheltered trust, that there was a very little short fall, that Ms. Quesada had some medical problems, but that she did not need Medical at this time, and Ms. Quesada would qualify for medical immediately. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Raymond Leung.
